modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to enable Analysis Toolpak add-in for Excel.

full_description_text: User attempted to enable the Analysis Toolpak add-in in Excel. Encountered an error message indicating that Office 365 is configured to prevent individual acquisition of Office Add-ins. This issue requires further investigation to understand the configuration settings. User is seeking assistance to resolve this matter.
